What We Do

Full Finishing Services

01
Wheel Refinishing
Strip, prep, powder coat. Any color, any finish, any size. Dramatic before/afters every time.
02
Powder Coating
6,000+ colors. Electrostatic finish that outlasts paint. Built for the road, the heat, the long haul.
03
Liquid Paint
Custom liquid finishes for parts that demand it. Full color matching. When powder isn't the answer.
04
High Polishing
Mirror-grade polishing on aluminum and chrome. The shine transformation is legendary.
05
Gates & Fences
Industrial-grade outdoor coatings built to last decades. Perfect for residential and commercial.
06
Media Blasting
Full strip to bare metal before every coat. No shortcuts. No exceptions. The Diavolo standard.
How It Works

The Diavolo Process

01
Drop Off
Bring your parts in. We assess, quote, and lock in your color same day.
02
Strip
Full media blast to bare metal. Zero shortcuts. Every time.
03
Coat
Electrostatic application. Even, thick, and flawless coverage.
04
Cure
Into the oven. Heat-cured for a permanent, unbreakable bond.
05
Pick Up
Ready to ride, install, or flex. Diabolical finish guaranteed.

Want a specific Prismatic color? Open the full catalog → — then copy the color's name or number into your quote.
Popular Finishes
Automotive Colors — search by name or paint code
RAL Classic
RAL Design — 1,330 colors (search to narrow)
Specialty & Metallic

Chrome, candy, and true metallics shift in the light and can't be shown perfectly on a screen. Pick the closest swatch above, or choose a finish and describe what you want in your quote — we'll dial it in.

Match My Car Color

Tell us your car's color and we'll match it to powder. The more you give us, the closer the match — give us at least the paint code, color name, or make & model.

We'll confirm the exact match with a physical sample before coating.

Find Your Color

Here's how to pick your exact color:

  1. We'll open Prismatic's color catalog in a new tab.
  2. Find your color and copy its name or item number.
  3. Come back to this tab and paste it in the color box.
